tasks.name: Request the earliest weekday evening adult cleaning next week at the Downtown clinic
tasks.description: Use the online booking system to schedule an adult teeth cleaning at the Downtown location on a weekday in the next calendar week, choosing the earliest available time slot at or after 5:00 PM, and submit the appointment request form with contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation menu item labeled "Book Appointment" or similar.
On the booking page, select "Existing Patient" (or the equivalent option) and choose "Adult Teeth Cleaning" from the list of services.
Use the location dropdown to select the "Downtown" clinic location.
Open the date picker and move to the next calendar week (the Monday–Sunday range immediately following the current week).
Apply any time-of-day filter (if available) to show only "Evening" times, or manually scroll through the weekday options to locate time slots at or after 5:00 PM.
Identify the earliest available weekday time slot that is at or after 5:00 PM in that next week and click on that specific time slot.
Click the button to continue or "Request Appointment", then in the form that appears enter a full name, a phone number, and the email "alex.smith@example.com" into the respective fields.
Click the final "Submit" or "Request Appointment" button to send the weekday evening adult cleaning request for the Downtown clinic.

tasks.name: Estimate and send the total cost for an uninsured molar root canal with a crown under $2,500
tasks.description: Find the prices for a molar root canal and available crown options for uninsured patients, select a crown option that costs $1,200 or less, calculate the combined total, and submit that total through a cost estimate contact form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services & Pricing" or similar menu item in the main navigation.
On the pricing page, use any category filters or links to open the "Restorative Dentistry" section and locate the listed price for an uninsured "Root Canal (Molar)" procedure.
In the same section, locate the crown options and identify a crown type (for example, "Porcelain" or "Ceramic") that has a listed price of $1,200 or less for uninsured patients.
Add the listed price of the selected crown to the listed price of the "Root Canal (Molar)" to determine a total treatment cost that is less than or equal to $2,500.
Use the site navigation to go to the "Contact" or "Request Cost Estimate" page that contains a contact form.

In the message or details text area of the form, type a short note stating that the user is uninsured, needs a molar root canal plus the selected crown type, and include the calculated total cost as a dollar amount (for example, "Estimated total: $2,300").
Fill in the required contact fields (such as name, phone, and email) and click the "Send" or "Submit" button to submit the cost estimate request with the total amount.

tasks.name: Book a Saturday 11:00 AM or later pediatric visit with a 4+ star dentist
tasks.description: Find a pediatric dentist with a rating of at least 4.0 stars who treats children under 12 and offers Saturday hours, then request a Saturday appointment at 11:00 AM or later for a 7-year-old child.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Our Dentists" or "Meet the Team" section in the main navigation.
On the provider listing page, use any specialty filter or dropdown to select "Pediatric Dentistry" or the equivalent pediatric option.
Among the pediatric dentists shown, identify a dentist whose profile displays a rating of at least 4.0 stars and click that dentist’s name or photo to open their profile.

On the dentist’s profile page, scroll to the section showing office hours and confirm that Saturday hours are listed, then click any "Schedule with this provider" or similar booking link on the profile.

In the booking interface for that dentist, choose the patient type or visit reason that indicates a child visit (for example, "Pediatric Exam" or "Child New Patient Exam") and, if prompted, indicate that the child is 7 years old.
Use the date picker to select an upcoming Saturday and then choose a time slot at or after 11:00 AM from the available times for that day.

Fill in the required appointment request form fields with the parent or guardian’s contact information and the child’s name, then click the final "Request Appointment" or "Submit" button to send the Saturday pediatric visit request.

tasks.name: Request an Invisalign consultation for an adult wanting nearly invisible braces under 24 months
tasks.description: Compare Invisalign and traditional metal braces options on the orthodontics information pages, decide that Invisalign matches an adult’s preference for nearly invisible treatment lasting less than 24 months, and submit a consultation request specifically mentioning Invisalign.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Orthodontics" or "Braces & Aligners" option from the main navigation or services menu.
On the orthodontics page, scroll to find information sections comparing "Invisalign" (or clear aligners) with "Traditional Metal Braces," focusing on appearance and typical treatment duration.

Based on the description, decide that Invisalign meets the goal of being nearly invisible and having an average treatment time of under 24 months, then click any "Schedule Invisalign Consultation" or "Request Consultation" button associated with the Invisalign section.
On the consultation request form, select "Adult" or an adult age range if a patient type or age dropdown is provided.
In the visit reason or service dropdown, choose "Invisalign Consultation" or the option that most closely matches Invisalign-specific treatment.
In the message or notes field, type a brief message stating that the user is an adult who prefers nearly invisible braces and is interested in Invisalign with a treatment time under 24 months.
Complete the remaining required fields such as name, phone, and email, then click the "Submit" or "Request Consultation" button to send the Invisalign consultation request.

tasks.name: Choose the preventive care insurance plan with higher coverage and request a cleaning
tasks.description: Compare two specific dental insurance plans on the practice’s insurance information page, determine which plan offers the higher preventive care coverage percentage, and submit a cleaning appointment request selecting that plan as the patient’s insurance.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Insurance & Payments" or similar link in the main navigation.

On the insurance information page, locate plan details for both "Delta Dental PPO" and "Cigna Dental" (or similar named plans) and identify the preventive care coverage percentage listed for each plan.
Determine which of the two plans provides the higher preventive coverage percentage (for example, 100% vs. 80%) and remember that plan’s name.
Use the navigation or a visible button to go to the "Book Appointment" or "Schedule Visit" page.
On the booking page, select a visit type such as "Adult Preventive Cleaning" or "Routine Cleaning" from the list of services.
In the insurance dropdown or insurance provider field on the appointment form, select or type the name of the plan that had the higher preventive care coverage.

Fill out the remaining required fields (such as preferred date range, name, phone, and email) and click the "Submit" or "Request Appointment" button to send the cleaning appointment request using the higher-coverage plan.

tasks.name: Send an emergency message for a severe toothache after 8:00 PM with a callback request
tasks.description: Find the after-hours emergency instructions for a severe toothache occurring at 9:00 PM, note the emergency phone number, and submit the emergency contact form including that number and a request to be called back that night.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Emergency Care" or "Dental Emergencies" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the emergency information page, scroll to find the section that describes what to do for a "Severe Toothache" and note the emergency phone number listed for after-hours situations.
Click the "Emergency Contact Form" or equivalent button or link provided on the emergency page.

In the emergency form’s message or description field, type that the user has a severe toothache at 9:00 PM, include the emergency phone number displayed on the site, and explicitly request a callback that same night (for example, "Please call me back tonight").
Fill in the required contact fields such as name and phone number to be used for the callback, and enter an email address if required.
Click the "Submit" or "Send Emergency Message" button to send the after-hours emergency toothache request.

tasks.name: Schedule a weekday afternoon new patient exam for a 10-year-old using the child new patient info
tasks.description: Access the new patient information for children, identify the appropriate visit type for a 10-year-old, and schedule a new patient exam on a weekday between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM, specifying that the patient is 10 years old.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "New Patients" or "First Visit" section in the main navigation.
On the new patient page, locate and click any subsection or tab specifically for children or pediatric patients (for example, "Children (Under 13)").
Read the child visit information to identify the recommended visit type for a first-time 10-year-old patient (such as "Child New Patient Exam") and note that visit type name.
Use the navigation or a visible button to go to the "Book Appointment" or "Schedule First Visit" page.
On the booking form, select the identified child visit type (for example, "Child New Patient Exam") and, if prompted, enter the child’s age as 10 years old.
Use the date and time selectors to choose a weekday (Monday–Friday) afternoon time slot between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM and click on one available time in that range.

Complete the parent or guardian contact details and the child’s name in the form fields, then click the "Submit" or "Request Appointment" button to send the weekday afternoon new patient exam request.

tasks.name: Claim a whitening promotion under $200 and book a morning consultation this month
tasks.description: Locate a cosmetic teeth whitening special offer priced under $200 for new patients, claim the offer, and schedule a whitening consultation on a morning time slot before 11:00 AM within the current calendar month.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Special Offers" or "Promotions" link in the main navigation or homepage banner.

On the offers page, scroll to find a cosmetic teeth whitening promotion specifically for new patients that is listed at a price less than or equal to $200 and click on that offer’s title or "Learn More" link.
On the promotion detail page, click the "Claim Offer" or "Schedule Whitening" button associated with that whitening promotion.
In the booking or claim form that appears, select the visit reason or service option that matches teeth whitening (for example, "Whitening Consultation").
Use the date picker to choose a date within the current calendar month and then select a morning time slot that starts before 11:00 AM (for example, 9:30 AM or 10:30 AM).
If a dropdown or checkbox is provided to indicate "New Patient," select that option to match the promotion requirements.
Fill in the required personal information fields (such as name, phone, and email) and click the "Submit" or "Confirm Booking" button to complete the whitening promotion consultation request.

entities.name: Location
entities.description: Clinic locations such as the Downtown clinic, with contact details and hours.

fields.name: hours
fields.description: Array of objects with fields: day_of_week (enum monday–sunday), open_time (string 'HH:MM'), close_time (string 'HH:MM').

entities.name: Dentist
entities.description: Dentists at the practice, including pediatric specialists and their ratings/availability.

fields.name: specialties
fields.description: Array of dentist_specialty enum values such as 'general_dentistry', 'pediatric_dentistry', 'orthodontics', 'endodontics', 'cosmetic_dentistry', 'oral_surgery', 'periodontics', 'prosthodontics', 'emergency_dentistry', 'other'.

fields.name: other_location_ids
fields.description: Array of additional Location ids where this dentist practices.

fields.name: available_service_ids
fields.description: Array of Service ids that this dentist commonly performs.

fields.name: office_hours
fields.description: Array of objects with fields: location_id, day_of_week, open_time, close_time, has_saturday, has_evening.

entities.name: Service
entities.description: Bookable visit reasons and billable procedures (e.g., Adult Teeth Cleaning, Root Canal (Molar), Crown types, Invisalign Consultation, Whitening Consultation).

entities.name: AppointmentSlot
entities.description: Individual bookable time slots at locations, optionally tied to a specific dentist and service.

entities.name: AppointmentRequest
entities.description: Submitted appointment or consultation requests (cleanings, pediatric visits, Invisalign consults, whitening, etc.).

fields.name: patient_name
fields.description: Name of the person being seen (adult or child).

fields.name: contact_name
fields.description: Name of the person to contact (self or parent/guardian).

fields.name: preferred_date
fields.description: Optional explicit date/time if not using appointment_slot_id.

entities.name: InsurancePlan
entities.description: Accepted insurance plans with coverage details used to compare preventive care coverage.

entities.name: Promotion
entities.description: Special offers and promotions (e.g., whitening promo under $200 for new patients).

entities.name: OrthodonticTreatmentOption
entities.description: Orthodontic treatment options such as Invisalign and traditional metal braces with appearance and duration details.

fields.name: related_service_id
fields.description: Service id for an associated consultation (e.g., Invisalign Consultation).

entities.name: NewPatientGuide
entities.description: Guidance content for new adult and child patients, including recommended visit types.

fields.name: recommended_service_id
fields.description: Service id such as 'Child New Patient Exam'.

entities.name: EmergencyInstruction
entities.description: Instructions for specific dental emergencies, including after-hours emergency phone number.

entities.name: ContactSubmission
entities.description: Submissions from the Contact & Cost Estimates page, including uninsured cost estimate requests.

fields.name: related_service_ids
fields.description: Array of Service ids referenced in the message (e.g., molar root canal, specific crown).

entities.name: EmergencyMessage
entities.description: Urgent messages submitted via the Emergency Contact Form, including callback requests.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-text description including symptoms and context (e.g., severe toothache at 9:00 PM).

fields.name: emergency_phone_number_displayed
fields.description: The emergency phone number copied from the Emergency Dental Care page.
